\BLOCK{- if scripts }
\RequirePackage{fontspec}
\makeatletter
% Auto-generated script helpers for moving arguments.
\BLOCK{ for script in scripts }
\BLOCK{ set font_name = script.get("font_name") }
\BLOCK{ set font_command = script.get("font_command") }
\BLOCK{ set text_command = script.get("text_command") }
\@ifundefined{\VAR{font_command}}{%
  \BLOCK{ if font_name }
  \IfFontExistsTF{\VAR{font_name}}{%
    \expandafter\newfontfamily\csname \VAR{font_command}\endcsname{\VAR{font_name}}%
  }{%
    \expandafter\newcommand\csname \VAR{font_command}\endcsname{}%
  }
  \BLOCK{ else }
  \expandafter\newcommand\csname \VAR{font_command}\endcsname{}%
  \BLOCK{ endif }
}{}%
\@ifundefined{\VAR{text_command}}{%
  \expandafter\DeclareRobustCommand\csname \VAR{text_command}\endcsname[1]{\textrm{#1}}%
}{%
  \expandafter\DeclareRobustCommand\csname \VAR{text_command}\endcsname[1]{{\csname \VAR{font_command}\endcsname#1}}%
}%
\BLOCK{ endfor }
\makeatother
\BLOCK{- endif }
